title: Hody Taunts Luffy
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is hody taunts luffy.
scene: The scene focuses on hody taunts luffy, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't understand what's going on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It would be a complete disaster!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We should do as the Minister says!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: everybody get out into the open water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've got word direct from the Plaza...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You mean decken was behind this?!

summary: Hody Taunts Luffy. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
